description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: H

You create seals to limit a target's strength, which is mainly used for training purposes. This technique has three different uses, and can be used on the target multiple times, as long as it has enough seal slots.

- Arms (Up to 2 seal slots): Each seal slot used incurs a -2 penalty to attack and weapon damage rolls, as well as Strength- and Dexterity-based skill checks requiring the use of your arms and/or hands.
- Chest (Up to 4 seal slots): Each seal slot used reduces the target's maximum Chakra Pool by 10 (minimum 1), and incurs a -2 penalty to Concentration checks.
- Legs (Up to 2 seal slots): Each seal slot used incurs a -2 penalty to unarmed attack and damage rolls, as well as to Strength- and Dexterity-based skill checks requiring specific use of your legs. In addition, each seal slot used incurs a -1 Speed Rank penalty.

The bearer can release one or more seals as a move action, which is generally accompanied by a burst of energy or a brief haze as their power is released.
